# Project Cedar
## Scope
- Deterministic memory retrieval for assistant workflows.
- Replace context-heavy markdown loading with chunk retrieval.

## Milestones
- Alpha complete: 2026-02-20
- Beta target: 2026-03-28
- Launch target: 2026-04-15

## Environments
- Dev host: dev-gateway.internal
- Staging host: stage-gateway.internal
- Demo host: demo-gateway.internal
